metadata.description: The Dataverse Instance to connect to within a Flow when using Web API Calls

parameters.subscriptionRequest/filterexpression: hso_iscopy eq false and _hso_templateid_value ne null

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [SUC] - [@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'HH:mm:ss')}] - Flow run was successful. All required Parameters and Template Positions have been added to the Calculation.

parameters.item/body: Eine neue Kalkulationsversion "@{triggerOutputs()?['body/hso_name']}" wurde erfolgreich aus der ausgewählten Vorlage erstellt.

inputs.name: varErrorMessage
inputs.value: [ERROR] - Action '@{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Action']}' failed with error message: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Message']} (Status: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Status']} / Status Code: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['StatusCode']})

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'HH:mm:ss')}] - Flow run has failed. Parameters and Template Positions may have been partially added to Calculation. Check Log or Flow Run for further details.

parameters.item/body: Beim Erstellen der Kalkulationsversion "@{triggerOutputs()?['body/hso_name']}"  aus der ausgewählten Vorlage ist ein Fehler aufgetreten!

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'HH:mm:ss')}] - Creating Calculation Surcharge Groups failed. @{body('Run_a_Child_Flow_to_copy_Surcharge_Groups')?['surcharge_groups processed']} of @{body('Run_a_Child_Flow_to_copy_Surcharge_Groups')?['surcharge_groups to process']} Surcharge Groups added. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'HH:mm:ss')}] - @{body('Run_a_Child_Flow_to_copy_Surcharge_Groups')?['surcharge_groups processed']} of @{body('Run_a_Child_Flow_to_copy_Surcharge_Groups')?['surcharge_groups to process']} Calculation Surcharge Groups added. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'HH:mm:ss')}] - Creating Calculation Metail Prices failed. @{body('Run_a_Child_Flow_to_copy_Metalprices')?['metalprices_processed']} of @{body('Run_a_Child_Flow_to_copy_Metalprices')?['metalprices_to process']} Metal Prices added. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'HH:mm:ss')}] - @{body('Run_a_Child_Flow_to_copy_Metalprices')?['metalprices_processed']} of @{body('Run_a_Child_Flow_to_copy_Metalprices')?['metalprices_to process']} Calculation Metal Prices added. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'HH:mm:ss')}] - Creating Calculation Payment Terms failed. @{body('Run_a_Child_Flow_to_copy_Default_Payment_Terms')?['payment_terms processed']} of @{body('Run_a_Child_Flow_to_copy_Default_Payment_Terms')?['payment_terms to process']} Payment Terms added. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'HH:mm:ss')}] - @{body('Run_a_Child_Flow_to_copy_Default_Payment_Terms')?['payment_terms processed']} of @{body('Run_a_Child_Flow_to_copy_Default_Payment_Terms')?['payment_terms to process']} Calculation Payment Terms added. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

select.Message: @coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'HH:mm:ss')}] - Creating Calculation Project Products failed. 0 of @{variables('varNumberOfCalculationProjectProducts_ToProcess')} Project Products added. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'HH:mm:ss')}] - Creating Calculation Project Category Sales Prices failed. @{body('Run_a_Child_Flow_to_copy_Project_Category_Sales_Prices')?['project_category_sales_prices_processed']} of @{body('Run_a_Child_Flow_to_copy_Project_Category_Sales_Prices')?['Project_Category_Sales_Prices_to_process']} Project Category Sales Prices added. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'HH:mm:ss')}] - 0 of @{length(variables('varTextblockProjectProducts'))} Calculation Project Product Textblocks added. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

Update_Processing_Log.description: Update Processing Log with processed Surcharge Groups, Metal Prices, Payment Terms, Sales Prices and Calculation Project Products

Filter_created_Calculation_Positions_to_.description: Only the Top-Level-Nodes need to be updated with "Set Default Values" - the Plug-In will process all subordinent positions accordingly

parameters.fetchXml:
<fetch distinct="true">
  <entity name="hso_templatedetail">
    <attribute name="hso_templatedetailid" />
    <attribute name="hso_positionelementtype" />
    <filter>
      <condition attribute="hso_templateid" operator="eq" value="@{triggerOutputs()?['body/_hso_templateid_value']}" />
    </filter>
    <order attribute="hso_sortinglinenumber" />
    <link-entity name="product" from="productid" to="hso_productid" link-type="outer" alias="AliasProduct">
      <attribute name="hso_globalproductid" />
      <attribute name="msdyn_productnumber" />
      <link-entity name="msdyn_globalproduct" from="msdyn_globalproductid" to="hso_globalproductid" link-type="outer" alias="AGlobalProduct">
        <link-entity name="hso_textblock" from="hso_globalproductid" to="msdyn_globalproductid" link-type="outer" alias="AGlobalProductTextblock">
          <attribute name="hso_description" />
          <attribute name="hso_language" />
          <attribute name="hso_name" />
          <filter type="or">
            <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerOutputs()?['body/hso_language']}" />
            <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{variables('intDefaultLanguage')}" />
          </filter>
          <order attribute="hso_language" @{variables('strTextblockOrder')} />
        </link-entity>
      </link-entity>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="hso_projectproduct" from="hso_projectproductid" to="hso_projectproductid" link-type="outer" alias="AliasProjectproduct">
      <attribute name="hso_name" />
      <link-entity name="hso_textblock" from="hso_projectproductid" to="hso_projectproductid" link-type="outer" alias="AProjectproductTextblock">
        <attribute name="hso_description" />
        <attribute name="hso_language" />
        <attribute name="hso_name" />
        <filter type="or">
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerOutputs()?['body/hso_language']}" />
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{variables('intDefaultLanguage')}" />
        </filter>
        <order attribute="hso_language" @{variables('strTextblockOrder')} />
      </link-entity>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="hso_projectexpense" from="hso_projectexpenseid" to="hso_projectexpenseid" link-type="outer" alias="AliasProjectexpense">
      <attribute name="hso_name" />
      <link-entity name="hso_textblock" from="hso_projectexpenseid" to="hso_projectexpenseid" link-type="outer" alias="AProjectexpenseTextblock">
        <attribute name="hso_description" />
        <attribute name="hso_language" />
        <attribute name="hso_name" />
        <filter type="or">
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerOutputs()?['body/hso_language']}" />
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{variables('intDefaultLanguage')}" />
        </filter>
        <order attribute="hso_language" @{variables('strTextblockOrder')} />
      </link-entity>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="hso_projecthour" from="hso_projecthourid" to="hso_projecthourid" link-type="outer" alias="AliasProjecthour">
      <link-entity name="hso_textblock" from="hso_projecthourid" to="hso_projecthourid" link-type="outer" alias="AProjecthourTextblock">
        <attribute name="hso_language" />
        <attribute name="hso_name" />
        <attribute name="hso_description" />
        <filter type="or">
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerOutputs()?['body/hso_language']}" />
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{variables('intDefaultLanguage')}" />
        </filter>
        <order attribute="hso_language" @{variables('strTextblockOrder')} />
      </link-entity>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="hso_externalservice" from="hso_externalserviceid" to="hso_externalserviceid" link-type="outer" alias="AliasExternalservice">
      <attribute name="hso_currentcost" />
      <link-entity name="hso_textblock" from="hso_externalserviceid" to="hso_externalserviceid" link-type="outer" alias="AExternalserviceTextblock">
        <attribute name="hso_description" />
        <attribute name="hso_language" />
        <attribute name="hso_name" />
        <filter type="or">
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerOutputs()?['body/hso_language']}" />
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{variables('intDefaultLanguage')}" />
        </filter>
        <order attribute="hso_language" @{variables('strTextblockOrder')} />
      </link-entity>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="hso_productionhour" from="hso_productionhourid" to="hso_productionhourid" link-type="outer" alias="AliasProductionhour">
      <link-entity name="hso_textblock" from="hso_productionhourid" to="hso_productionhourid" link-type="outer" alias="AProductionhourTextblock">
        <attribute name="hso_language" />
        <attribute name="hso_name" />
        <attribute name="hso_description" />
        <filter type="or">
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerOutputs()?['body/hso_language']}" />
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{variables('intDefaultLanguage')}" />
        </filter>
        <order attribute="hso_language" @{variables('strTextblockOrder')} />
      </link-entity>
    </link-entity>
  </entity>
</fetch>

Set_varNumberOfItemsPerBulkOperationMess.description: Always round up to the next whole number

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'HH:mm:ss')}] - Accelerate maximum DOP to process Calculation Positions. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'HH:mm:ss')}] - Accelerate individual DOP to process Calculation Positions. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'HH:mm:ss')}] - Creating Calculation Positions failed. @{variables('varNumberOfCalculationPositions_Created')} of @{variables('varNumberOfCalculationPositions_ToProcess')} Calculation Positions added. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'HH:mm:ss')}] - Creating Calculation Positions failed. 0 of @{variables('varNumberOfCalculationPositions_ToProcess')} Calculation Positions added. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'HH:mm:ss')}] - Assigning Parent-Child-Relationships failed. @{variables('varNumberOfCalculationPositions_Updated')} of @{length(body('Exclude_Level-1-Nodes_from_Calculation_Details'))} Parent-Child-Relationships assigned. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'HH:mm:ss')}] - Assigning Parent-Child-Relationships failed. 0 of @{length(body('Exclude_Level-1-Nodes_from_Calculation_Details'))} Parent-Child-Relationships assigned. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

select.Message: @coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')

Remove_Project_Products_from_Template_De.description: Remove all Positions of Type 'Project Product' - these Positions are already added to the Payload in the previous step

Remove_BOM_Project_Products_from_Templat.description: Remove all Positions where a BOM Project Product is assigned - these Positions are already added to the Payload in the previous step

Filter_Template_Positions_by_Project_Pro.description: Get all Template Positions of Type 'Project Product' where no BOM is assigned. Project Product Positions with BOM are processed separately because both the Project Product GUID and the BOM Project Product GUID must be replaced.

Filter_Template_Positions_by_BOM_Project.description: Get all Template Positions where a BOM Project Product is assigned. Exclude Positions from Type 'Project Product' - these Positions are processed separately because both the Project Product GUID and the BOM Project Product GUID must be replaced.

Filter_Template_Positions_by_Project_Pro.description: Get all Template Positions of Type 'Project Product' where a BOM Project Product is assigned. Both the Project Product GUID and the BOM Project Product GUID must be replaced.

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'HH:mm:ss')}] - @{length(body('Select_Calculation_Positions_to_set_Default_Values'))} of @{length(body('Select_Calculation_Positions_to_set_Default_Values'))} Level-1-Nodes updated to set default values. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'HH:mm:ss')}] - Set Default Values for created Calculation Positions failed. 0 of @{length(body('Select_Calculation_Positions_to_set_Default_Values'))} Level-1-Nodes updated to set default values. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Set Default Values for @{length(body('Select_Payload_to_set_default_values_for_Calculation_Positions'))} Calculation Positions (only highest levels). @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Initiated function "Set Default Values" for @{length(body('Select_Payload_to_set_default_values_for_Calculation_Positions'))} Level-1 Calculation Positions. However the default values are set for all imported Calculation Positions. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Calling function "Set Default Values" for @{length(body('Select_Payload_to_set_default_values_for_Calculation_Positions'))} Level-1 Calculation Positions failed. Please try setting the default values for the calculation by manually selecting the button within the calculation ribbon bar. If the error persists contact an admin. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

select.Message: @coalesce(item()?['outputs']?['body']?['error']?['message'], item()?['outputs']?['body']?['message'], item()?['error']?['message'], 'No Message found. Please check Flow-Run.')

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{formatDateTime(utcNow(), 'HH:mm:ss')}] - Adding Calculation Positions is skipped because required Parameters are missing. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

definition.description: Wird eine neue Kalkulationsversion aus einer Vorlage erstellt, werden die benötigten Parameter wie Zuschlagsgruppen, Metallpreise, Verkaufspreise und Zahlungsbedingungen aus den Stammdaten übernommen. Hierzu werden die Child Flows "Copy Surcharge Groups for new Calculation", "Copy Metalprices for new Calculation", "Copy Default Payment Terms for new Calculation", "Copy Project Category Sales Prices for new Calculation" und "Fetch FinOps Trade Agreements for new Calculation" ausgeführt. Die Kalkulationspositionen werden aus den Vorlagenpositionen übernommen.
